thought.text: 我将直接构建 task0 并运行评分目标。

action.command: cmake --build /workspace/YatCC/build -t task0 && cmake --build /workspace/YatCC/build -t task0-score && (cat /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task0/score.txt 2>/dev/null || find /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task0 -maxdepth 2 -type f -print -exec sed -n '1,120p' {} \;)

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "cmake --build /workspace/YatCC/build -t task0 && cmake --build /workspace/YatCC/build -t task0-score && (cat /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task0/score.txt 2>/dev/null || find /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task0 -maxdepth 2 -type f -print -exec sed -n '1,120p' {} \\;)", "timeout": 120, "security_risk": "MEDIUM", "summary": "Build task0 target and run scoring"}

summary: Build task0 target and run scoring
